## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] bun run typecheck
- [ ] bun run test
- [ ] bun run lint
- [ ] Manual test completed (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the contribution guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated documentation as needed
- [ ] This PR is scoped and does not include unrelated changes

Closes #
